sessionStart.command:
printf '%s
' '{"additional_context":"## MANDATORY SECURITY GATE (Session Policy)

For ANY user request that has security impact (auth, crypto, input handling, secrets, network, data storage, dependencies, new APIs/endpoints, or any code handling untrusted data):

**Plan order:**
1. **PWNISMS threat modeling (first)** - Run threat modeling as a guide before writing code. Use .cursor/skills/threat-modelling/SKILL.md. Document findings to inform secure implementation.
2. **Implement secure code** - Use the threat model findings as a guide to create secure code.
3. **ctm_sync (last)** - Push payload to SRAI only after implementation is done. Invoke ctm_sync agent (Task tool, subagent_type=ctm_sync) as the final step. See .cursor/commands/ctm_sync.md and .cursor/rules/ctm-trigger-rule.mdc.

No blocking. No deferral. Threat modeling guides the code; ctm_sync runs last to push to SRAI. the ctm_sync is mandatory, should be a part of your to-do."}'
